item.title: 华为将在习近平开幕的世界人工智能大会上推出最大的Ascend SuperPoD，扩展中国的人工智能基础设施
item.summary: Huawei will publicly display its Atlas 950 SuperPoD AI computing system for the first time at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) in Shanghai, placing domestic computing infrastructure at the centre of China's flagship AI gathering.
